summary: Aayat Real Estate Phase 1 tested end-to-end. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests PASS (properties list/CRUD + view increment, admin auth guard, settings GET/PUT with CMS fields, leads full flow, admin analytics with kpis+30-day series, testimonials & faqs CRUD). Frontend: Home hero + Live Mumbai copy + PremiumLoader + LiveSearch (Cmd/K palette, Bandra returns results) + DarkMode toggle (html.class='dark') + Nav favorites + all filters + PropertyCards render; property details renders masonry gallery, fullscreen viewer (open/close/toggle-grid), EMI calculator responsive to slider, pd-favorite/compare/share/copy/brochure/whatsapp/inquiry all present, WhatsApp href uses wa.me and contains 'Aayat' + property name, Google Maps iframe src has google.com/maps, brochure PDF actually downloads, inquiry form submits and shows success toast; Admin login works, all 6 sidebar tabs present, admin-kpis + 9 Recharts charts rendering, Add Property opens ImageUploader dropzone.

issues: Filter select dropdowns and chips visually overlap the search input row when viewport = 1920x1080 (chips appear stacked over 'Search residences, locations…' placeholder). Consider grid/flex reflow so controls are on separate rows or wrap cleanly.

action_items: (Optional) Address the Properties page filter/search visual overlap noted above.

(Optional) Analytics `top_views` still shows a stale 'TEST_Property' entry (my automated backend CRUD test created+deleted a doc; the deletion succeeded and property is gone from list, so the persisted view count on a since-deleted property is being retained by MongoDB `views` field written on GET before delete). Not a bug per spec, just an observation.
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/properties/{id} requires the FULL Property model (uses `prop: Property` not a partial update DTO). This works but is not RESTful and forces clients to send every field; consider a PropertyUpdate schema with Optional fields.

GET /api/properties/{property_id} increments views via update on every read; this doubles as a debugging aid but pollutes real analytics because previews/bots/admin loads also count. Consider guarding with a header or ignoring admin-token reads.
server.py is 437 lines — approaching the 700-line ceiling; consider splitting routers per resource (properties, leads, cms, admin) as Phase 2 grows.

PropertyCard uses testid `compare-<id>` for the compare toggle; documenting this in the review spec (spec referred to it as a 'compare button' on cards without a fixed testid) prevents future confusion.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data left. Backend CRUD test created TEST_Property, TEST_Lead, TEST_T (testimonial), TEST_Q (faq) — all deleted in same test. UI inquiry test created 1 lead ('TEST User', 9990001111) which persists.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Admin auth via POST /api/admin/login returning {token:'aayat-admin-mock-token'} used as X-Admin-Token header. Analytics endpoint returns kpis nested (not flat). PUT /api/properties requires full Property body. Lead model uses `full_name` (not `name`), Testimonial uses `quote` (not `message`). PropertyCard compare testid is `compare-<id>`. Gallery-prev/next appear only in single-image slide mode (not while gallery-toggle-grid is showing grid).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no unresolved bugs. Initial 4 pytest failures were test-data-schema mismatches (my payloads used wrong field names); fixed by aligning to server Pydantic models.
